plain_english_boundary.mlb_model: Produces baseball-judgment recommendations: fair probability, edge, confidence, action, size guidance, thesis/reasons, and game-state-aware recommendation context.
plain_english_boundary.sports_bot_v2_model_bridge: Applies execution-side intake/gating: freshness checks, confidence/edge thresholds, entry price validity, duplicate/open-slug rejection, market-type restrictions, and approval filtering before execution.
plain_english_boundary.sports_bot_v2_bot_core: Runs only the bridge-approved production execution path. Local MLB origination is disabled by default and does not drive production opens.

recommendation_api_baseball_judgment: Recommendation object construction with fair/model probability outputs
bot_core_production_path: LOCAL MLB ORIGINATION DISABLED early continue
open_position(...) and insert_open_trade(...) only after bridge approval

current_production_path_plain_english: mlb_model recommendation -> sports_bot_v2/core/model_bridge.py execution-side approval filter -> sports_bot_v2/bot_core.py bridge execution branch -> open_position -> insert_open_trade. The old local MLB origination path is disabled by default and not part of production opens.

second_brain_check.details: signal_base/local origination logic still exists in codebase but is gated off from the production open path by default.

remaining_real_boundary_violation.details: No remaining execution-style gate was proven to still live in recommendation_api.py in a way that requires a code move right now. The actual active execution gating is already primarily in sports_bot_v2/core/model_bridge.py.

conclusion: This architecture item should be closed honestly. The current production authority boundary is clean enough for this stage, and no real code move is needed in the allowed files right now.
